expected_static_findings: No console errors expected on load: all scripts are same-origin static files; fonts load from fonts.googleapis.com (preconnected).
SpeechRecognition/speechSynthesis absence is handled (mic hidden, TTS wrapped in try/catch).
With backend down, views render honest error/empty states (CF.ui.error / CF.ui.empty) rather than throwing.
